clusters.justification: These terms reflect core processes of emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and subjective mood grounded in the macroscopic co-activation of salience and limbic systems.
These terms describe the computation of incentive salience, reward learning, and cost-benefit analysis mediated by the macroscopic striatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry.
These terms represent internally directed representations of the self, others, and past experiences integrated via the macroscopic default mode network.
